competences.title: TypeScript
competences.description: TypeScript is a free and open-source programming language developed and maintained by Microsoft. It is a strict syntactical superset of JavaScript and adds optional static typing to the language. It is designed for the development of large applications and transpiles to JavaScript

competences.title: React Native
competences.description: React Native is an open-source UI software framework created by Meta Platforms, Inc. It is used to develop applications for Android, Android TV, iOS, macOS, tvOS, Web, Windows, and UWP by enabling developers to use the React framework along with native platform capabilities

competences.title: HTML
competences.description: The HyperText Markup Language or HTML is the standard markup language for documents designed to be displayed in a web browser. It can be assisted by technologies such as Cascading Style Sheets and scripting languages such as JavaScript

competences.title: Python Django
competences.description: Django is a free and open-source, Python-based web framework that follows the model–template–views architectural pattern. It is maintained by the Django Software Foundation, an independent organization established in the US as a 501 non-profit

competences.title: React
competences.description: React is a free and open-source front-end JavaScript library for building user interfaces based on UI components. It is maintained by Meta and a community of individual developers and companies.

competences.title: GitHub
competences.description: GitHub, Inc., is an Internet hosting service for software development and version control using Git. It provides the distributed version control of Git plus access control, bug tracking, software feature requests, task management, continuous integration, and wikis for every project

competences.title: MySQL
competences.description: MySQL is an open-source relational database management system. Its name is a combination of "My", the name of co-founder Michael Widenius's daughter My, and "SQL", the abbreviation for Structured Query Language

projects.title: Sunshine-delivery
projects.description:
Sunshine delivery is an application with a web admin panel for restaurants and the API for the mobile application which is used by the drivers and customers.

All information about the order is available on the ordering apps to make the process as seamless as possible. The app tells the customer about the quality of the food, the time it will take to be prepared, and when the food will be ready for pickup or the time it will take to be delivered.

This application allows customers to order food online, and track their order, and the driver.

Technology stack :

  • Python Django
  • TypeScript
  • SQLite 3
  • Bootstrap 3
  • React Native

Restaurant dashboard ==> https://www.sunshinedeliver.com/restaurant/sign-in/?next=/restaurant/

Client App ==>
https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.ludmil.SD

info.mini_about:
My philosophy is all about delivering value!

The core of my approach is gaining a deep understanding of your needs and, in collaboration with you, developing solutions to deliver value to your needs. My initial objective is to identify how to deliver tangible value with a bit-size chunk of work and use that as a starting point. l recognize that many of my software solutions are evolutionary and, if required, design my solutions with cost-of-ownership, scalability, and flexibility in mind.
info.about:
Technology and software are in my DNA

My Approach is collaborative.

 The best solutions are delivered with a successful collaboration between myself and you. Embracing an Agile approach, l build applications iteratively and incrementally to incorporate feedback and welcome changing requirements. While following a strategy, l constantly inspect and adapt to develop the best possible solution and meet the overall objectives.
